instructions: API layer only. Routers stay thin — no Stockfish imports. All chess analysis in services/. Match patterns in existing services. See root .greptile/rules.md for product foundations.

rules.rule: Flag chess, chess.engine, or subprocess Stockfish usage in routers/. Must use services/stockfish.py via AnalysisService or MoveClassifier.
Move classification changes must preserve storage of eval_before, eval_after, is_brilliant on game_moves for threshold tuning.
